title: Vivi Explains the Rebellion
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on vivi explains the rebellion, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Vivi Explains the Rebellion. The crew moves across Alabasta as Vivi explains the rebellion, Crocodile’s manipulation, and the need to stop the civil war. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But I swear I won't stop trying! I can't let this senseless violence continue!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And I can't allow the Baroque Works to continue doing what it wants either!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Well, don't you worry about our trek through the desert! I'll make sure you stay well-nourished!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I can't wait to start our journey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The operation begins two days from now at 7am.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Have you finished with the necessary preparations?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, and there are no delays.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: 150 "Billions" Agents are awaiting orders at Namohana.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: I've also called back Mr. 2, as it sounded like he wasn't making much progress in finding Mr. 3...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They'll all be meeting tonight at 8 at Spider's Cafe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And it's just about 5 o'clock already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They should all be arriving there any time now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Spider's Cafe (Baroque Works' Headquarters in Alabasta)

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: YeahYeah, Merry Christmas Merry Christmas! Dammit I'm tired!
